retry_reason: Put operations decrement the refcount unconditionally; retrying after decrement would be a double-put and is never correct.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper for the bpf_cpumask reference-counted type. It unconditionally decrements the reference count of the cpumask via the underlying bpf_cpumask_release (which touches cpumask->usage.refs). After this call, the caller must not access the cpumask again, as it may have been freed. There is no return value to check; the operation is assumed to be valid. This function is typically used as a destructor callback (e.g., in kfunc release semantics).

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to release a reference on a bpf_cpumask via bpf_cpumask_release, with no other logic.
